results.title: Niall Horan shares 'funny' tale about his performance on One Direction's song
results.description: Niall Horan shares 'funny' tale about his performance on One Direction’s songNiall Horan recently opened up about how his solo performance of his former band One Direction’s Steal My Girl amazed him.The 32-year-old Irish singer-songwriter and musician performed Steal My Girl before...
